senses.gloss: unit (a standard measure of a quantity)
unit (a group within an organization that has been assigned a specific duty or function)
unit; module (part of a book or educational course)
union, unity; oneness (the state of being united as one)
loneliness, solitude (a feeling of depression resulting from being alone)

examples.text: الْوَحْدَةُ قَدْ تَكُونُ فُرْصَةً لِلتَّفْكِيرِ وَٱسْتِكْشَافِ الذَّاتِ.
examples.english: Solitude can be an opportunity for reflection and self-discovery.

body.text: the first night after burial: so called because the soul is believed to remain in the grave during this night, and then to depart to the place appointed for the residence of good souls until the last day, or to the appointed prison in which wicked souls await their final doom. See also
